name: Canvas Export

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

Resolves the four warnings reported by the [Obsidian community-plugin scorecard](https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/canvas-export#scorecard) against 1.0.1 — no behaviour change for end users.

### Fixes
- Type the implicit `any` from `Plugin.loadData()` and `JSON.parse(...)` in `main.ts` and `src/converters.ts` (`@typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-assignment`).
- Use `window.setTimeout` instead of `activeWindow.setTimeout` for the PDF render delay (`obsidianmd/prefer-window-timers`).

### Tooling and docs
- Add `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` (the same plugin the reviewer bot runs) as a devDependency, with `eslint.config.mjs` and an `npm run lint` script.
- Add `CONTRIBUTING.md` covering build, lint, issues, PRs, and releases.
- Bump `typescript` devDependency to 4.9.5 to satisfy the new lint plugin's peer-dep requirements.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/rmoff/obsidian-canvas-export/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: rmoff
releases.description: Initial release. Export canvas files to HTML (light/dark), Excalidraw, Mermaid, D2, and PDF.
